units.name: var-data.mount
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=Mount data disk

[Mount]
What=/dev/disk/by-partlabel/data
Where=/var/data
Type=xfs

[Install]
WantedBy=local-fs.target

units.name: var-data-nfs-setup.service
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=Create NFS export directory
After=var-data.mount
Requires=var-data.mount

[Service]
Type=oneshot
RemainAfterExit=yes
ExecStart=/usr/bin/mkdir -p /var/data/nfs

[Install]
WantedBy=local-fs.target

units.name: nextnfs.service
units.contents:
[Unit]
Description=NextNFS server (container)
After=network-online.target var-data-nfs-setup.service
Wants=network-online.target
Requires=var-data-nfs-setup.service

[Service]
Type=simple
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
ExecStartPre=/bin/bash -c 'echo Waiting for DNS...; for i in $(seq 1 60); do getent hosts registry.gt.lo && exit 0; sleep 2; done; echo DNS timeout; exit 1'
ExecStartPre=-/usr/bin/podman rm -f nextnfs
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman run --name nextnfs --rm --network host -v /var/data/nfs:/export:z --pull=always registry.gt.lo:5000/nextnfs:latest
ExecStop=/usr/bin/podman stop nextnfs
TimeoutStartSec=300
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
